_meta.source: orchard-cde/website tailwind.config.ts — the `orchard` green scale, plus globals.css background/foreground. These are the only color values any surface defines today.

tbd.accent: No accent / CTA color exists in any surface yet. Decide before consumers rely on one.
tbd.semantic: success / warning / error / info are not defined anywhere yet.
tbd.neutral: Grays currently inherit Tailwind defaults; not yet pinned as explicit tokens.
